# Chapter 2: Reactions and equilibria  (~90 pp)
- 2.1 Stoichiometry refresher (10) · 2.2 Reaction rates and Arrhenius (12) · 2.3 Chemical equilibrium and Le Chatelier (12) · 2.4 Acid-base, redox, complexation (15) · 2.5 Free energy revisited (12) · 2.6 Catalysis (12) · 2.7 Failure section: runaway reactions and what triggers them (Bhopal preview, Texas City refinery) (17)

**Archetype**: balance, stability, failure. **Project**: titrate a household acid; quantify uncertainty. **Exercises**: 30.
